prompt: We've been texting for 3 days, mostly small talk. I want to make it a bit more flirty without going overboard. What do I say next?
She sent 'lol you're funny' after my joke. Feels like a good moment to push the vibe a little. What should I reply?
First time talking to a guy I matched with on Hinge. His opener was 'hey'. How do I respond in a way that doesn't kill it immediately?
We're clearly into each other but nobody's said anything outright. I want to test the water without confessing anything yet.
She just sent a selfie unprompted. What's a good way to react that's not just 'you're pretty'?
We've been going back and forth all night and it's getting a little suggestive. I want to keep it playful but not creepy.
I sent a paragraph about my day and she replied 'oh nice'. That's it.
He's been replying with one word answers for two days straight and I don't know if he's busy or losing interest.
I asked her out for coffee and she left me on read for 6 hours then replied 'maybe'.
She used to double text me all the time, now I'm the one always texting first and getting short replies.
I sent a meme I thought was hilarious and got just a thumbs up emoji back.
We had a great date but her texts since have been really flat, like she's not that interested anymore.
I accidentally called her by my ex's name during a call. She went quiet after. What do I text now?
I left her on read for a full day by accident because I fell asleep, and now she's clearly annoyed.
I made a joke about her weight that didn't land at all and she got quiet for the rest of the night.
I forgot our one-month anniversary and she brought it up sounding hurt. How do I respond without sounding like I'm making excuses?
I cancelled our plans last minute for the second time this month and she just replied 'sure, no worries' which feels loaded.
I brought up her ex during a normal conversation without thinking and the mood dropped instantly.
It's been a rough week and I really miss my girlfriend who's traveling for work. Want to tell her without sounding needy.
We haven't seen each other in three weeks because of our schedules and I'm starting to feel disconnected. How do I bring that up?
I keep thinking about my ex randomly even though I ended things. Not sure if I should say anything to my current partner about it.
My partner is going through a stressful exam period and has barely texted me back all week. I miss them but don't want to add pressure.
Need a date idea for a Tuesday evening, low budget, both of us are exhausted from work but still want to see each other.
Her birthday is in 5 days and I have no idea what to get her, we've only been dating for two months.
My girlfriend's been feeling insecure about us lately and I want to reassure her without it sounding rehearsed.
Planning a surprise anniversary dinner but she's vegetarian and picky about ambience — need a solid plan I can actually pull off.
She said 'k' after I asked if she wanted to hang out this weekend.
He texted 'we need to talk' and then went offline.
She liked my Instagram story from 8 months ago out of nowhere.
I don't know what's going on, things just feel off between us lately.
